products.name: TRAIL MIX
products.desc: A hearty mix of nuts, dried fruit and chocolate — good fuel for a hike or a fireside snack.

products.name: INSTANT OATMEAL
products.desc: Single-serve oats, ready in two minutes. Comes with maple and cinnamon packets.

products.name: BREAKFAST KIT
products.desc: Eggs, bacon, bread and butter — everything for a slow morning at the cabin.

products.name: LOCAL IPA 6-PACK
products.desc: Cold, from a brewery twenty minutes down the road. Delivered chilled.

products.name: COLD BREW COFFEE
products.desc: Bottled cold brew, no fridge required until you open it.

products.name: FIREWOOD BUNDLE
products.desc: Seasoned hardwood, enough for one full evening by the fire pit.

products.name: FIRE STARTER KIT
products.desc: Kindling, matches and starter cubes — everything but the wood.

products.name: PROPANE CANISTER
products.desc: Standard 1lb canister for the cabin stove or lantern.

products.name: MAPLE SYRUP
products.desc: Small-batch, from a farm up the valley. Take a jar home.

products.name: HONEY JAR
products.desc: Raw wildflower honey from a local apiary.

products.name: WOOL SOCKS
products.desc: Thick hand-knit wool socks — cold-floor insurance.

products.name: TRAVEL SOAP
